label: grcp2_short_len_payload_from_no
description: copy short comment length+payload region from donor onto no-comment baseline

label: grcp2_short_len_only_from_no
description: set short donor length dword only (no payload bytes copied)

label: grcp2_short_payload_only_from_no
description: copy short donor payload bytes only (leave length dword at zero)

label: grcp2_short_len_payload_nonul_from_no
description: copy short payload but set length to exclude trailing NUL

label: grcp2_short_reset_len0_from_short
description: from short donor baseline set comment length dword to zero only

label: grcp2_style_bold_len_payload_from_plain
description: from plain style donor copy bold len+payload region

label: grcp2_style_italic_len_payload_from_plain
description: from plain style donor copy italic len+payload region

label: grcp2_style_underline_len_payload_from_plain
description: from plain style donor copy underline len+payload region

label: grcp2_style_bold_payload_only_from_plain
description: from plain style donor copy bold payload bytes only (no length update)

label: grcp2_max1400_len_payload_from_no
description: copy max(1400-char) donor len+payload region from no-comment baseline

label: grcp2_max1400_len_only_from_no
description: set max(1400-char) donor length only without payload copy

label: grcp2_max1400_payload_only_from_no
description: copy max(1400-char) donor payload only with length left zero
